degraded.reason: Pre-existing sweep-outbox warning from setup_iterate_worktree (trg-671bb0a2: a status append dropped by a prior merge) — unrelated to this change's footprint; non-fatal, the worktree was still created.

surface_verification.justification: WP11b hardens framework-internal tooling (commit_event_followup, security-report markdown escaping), CI workflow shell config, and pytest CI-discipline guards. No startable web/cli/api application surface; behaviors are verified by the unit + integration suite. small complexity, no touches_io_boundary or UI.

behaviors.behavior: F18: commit_event_followup skips (status=skipped/staged_changes) when the index has unrelated staged WIP
F18: follow-up commit is path-restricted to the event file; other unstaged worktree changes stay uncommitted
F32: PR-mode findings table cells pipe/newline-escaped -> no column shift, raw pipe never verbatim
F32: standard report findings table cells pipe-escaped -> no column shift
F32: benign cell values render unchanged (escaping is a no-op, no stray backslash-pipe)
F39: Install Gitleaks step sets shell:bash (activates -o pipefail) in ci.yml, security.yml, template
F39: the false default-pipefail comment is removed from all 3 workflow files
F40: install-hook tests gate on bash via skip_or_fail_on_missing_binary (no crash on bash-less host; CI-fail branch present)
F41: per-hook-command FileNotFoundError handler hard-fails in CI, skips only locally (ADR-044)
